# Project Onboarding Checklist
Welcome to OpenSSF! As part of our onboarding process, we have a checklist for you and our project team to complete. 
Please reach out if you have any questions about these.

### Linux Foundation
- [ ] Work with the program manager and Linux Foundation Formation Team to complete formation documents (contribution agreement, series agreement, technical charter)

### GitHub
- [ ] Transfer repo to OpenSSF GitHub Enterprise
- [ ] Add thelinuxfoundation as an owner
- [ ] Identify who is part of the TSC by listing contributors and maintainers in a CONTRIBUTORS.md or README.md
- [ ] Once the technical charter is signed, add to your repo
- [ ] Adopt OpenSSF Code of Conduct [LINK]. You can link to it in the readme. 

### Website
- [ ] Provide current project website, if applicable?
- [ ] Update the website footer with: Copyright © [PROJECT NAME] a Series of LF Projects, LLC. For web site terms of use, trademark policy and other project policies please see https://lfprojects.org/.

### General Questions
- [ ] Detail infrastructure needs or requests.
